title: Hadoop Data Processing Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps of processing large datasets using the core Hadoop components.
relationships: Client submits a job to the NameNode
NameNode manages file metadata and directs Client to DataNodes
DataNodes store blocks of data across the cluster
JobTracker receives the job and assigns Map/Reduce tasks to TaskTrackers
TaskTrackers execute tasks on local DataNodes and return results
